products.title: Ultimate Leggings - Eucalyptus Green
products.body_html:
Meet our best selling Ultimate Leggings. Made from a new better than ever premium Ultimate fabric that is even more hardworking. These leggings are designed without a front seam as well as a higher waistline for extra support and to contour the body. For everyday movement, our Ultimate delivers far beyond the gym. So versatile with your daily rotation in mind. Available in three lengths: full length, 7/8 and tall.

 

→ 79% Polyamide, 21% Elastane
→ Medium compression
→ Smoothing & sculpting
→ High rise waistband
→ Squat proof
→ 4-way stretch

 

Take good care of me:

→ Wash inside out
→ Wash on a gentle setting
→ Wash on low temperature, no more than 30 degrees
→ Wash by hand if possible
→ Do not tumble dry
→ Do not overload washing machine

products.title: Adanola Water Bottle 950ml - Coffee Bean
products.body_html:

→ 88% Stainless Steel, 12% Polypropylene
→ 950ml
→ Coffee bean
→ Double-wall insulation
→ Laser engraved brand along the length

 

Take good care of me:

→ Do not use harsh harsh abrasive cleaners/scourers
→ Handwash before first use
→ Do not use with fizzy/carbonated drinks
→ Handwash the body of the bottle to preserve the finish

products.title: ADA Oversized Sweatshirt - Blossom Blue/Buttercream
products.body_html:

To get the laid-back athleisure look, style with the our ultimate leggings, perfect for lounging or coffee dates.

→ 100% Organic Cotton loop-back
→ 420gsm medium weight
→ Screen-printed 'ADA' varsity logo on centre chest

Take good care of me:
→ Wash inside out, on a gentle setting
→ Wash cold
→ Wash by hand if possible
→ Do not tumble dry or dry at high temperatures
→ Lay flat to dry
→ Reshape while damp
→ Do not overload washing machine
→ Ironing once dry will help regain softness of fabric

Please note there may be a slight colour difference between the activewear and sweats due to the dyeing process and composition of the fabrics.

products.title: Varsity Oversized Hoodie - Clay Beige
products.body_html:
The Oversized Hoodie is a feel-good piece. Made from our new 100% Organic Cotton, this hoodie combines comfort and style with its relaxed oversized fit. Featuring an applique patch varsity logo, dropped shoulders and large kangaroo pocket. Wear it on casual days with the matching sweatpants.

→ 100% Organic Cotton Loop-back
→ 3-piece hood fit
→ Applique patch varsity logo
→ 420GSM medium weight

How to care for your organic cotton sweats.

Our new organic cotton is a natural fibre and should be washed with care:

→ Wash cold, on a gentle setting, inside out - do not wash on a hot cycle as the natural fibres will warp and reduce in size
→ Avoid using fabric conditioner - it clogs the pores causing the fabric to lose their natural softness
→ Gently reshape when wet
→ Lay flat to dry & make sure to remove from the washer promptly
→ Iron on a warm temp to remove any creases

products.title: Seamless Racer Back Bra - Breeze Blue
products.body_html:
Meet our seamless activewear fabric designed to support you through heavier workouts. Crafted from a soft, lightweight composition. This sweat-wicking fabric keeps you cool and comfortable with breathable compression that hugs your body like a second skin. This new fabric provides support through every rep and set, adapting effortlessly to every motion. The Seamless Racer Back Bra features engineered breathable panels, bonded edges, adjustable straps and tonal branding. Style yours with the matching seamless shorts for a complete look. Get ready to move with Seamless.

Learn more about our Seamless fabric.

→ Sweat-wicking
→ 4-way stretch

→ Compression sculpting fit
→ Mesh panel inserts
→ Bonded edges
→ Racer back cut
→ Adjustable straps
→ Removable pads

Take good care of me:

→ Wash on low temperature, no more than 30 degrees
→ Wash by hand if possible
→ Do not tumble dry
→ Do not overload washing machine

products.title: AS Reverse Loopback Loose Fit Sweatshirt - Breeze Blue
products.body_html:
The AS Reverse Sweatshirt is crafted from lightweight loopback organic cotton for everyday comfort. Designed with a relaxed, boxy fit and dropped shoulders, it creates an effortlessly loose silhouette. Finished with a reverse loopback texture for a textured feel, it pairs perfectly with matching sweatpants or leggings for an easy, laid-back look.

→ 100% Organic Cotton
→ Reverse loopback - 420GSM
→ Graphite grey embroidered AS badge on chest left hand side

How to care for your organic cotton sweats.

Our new organic cotton is a natural fibre and should be washed with care:

→ Wash cold, on a gentle setting - do not wash on a hot cycle as the natural fibres will warp and reduce in size
→ Avoid using fabric conditioner - it clogs the pores causing the fabric to lose their natural softness
→ Gently reshape when wet
→ Lay flat to dry & make sure to remove from the washer promptly
→ Iron on a warm temp to remove any creases
